ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "upward_solar_radiation" REAL /* Upward looking solar radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision spectral pyranometer (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "upward_near_ir_radiation" REAL /* Upward looking near-IR radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision spectral pyranometer with IR filter (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "downward_solar_radiation" REAL /* Downward looking solar radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision spectral pyranometer (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "downward_clear_solar_radiation" REAL /* Downward looking clear solar radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision spectral pyranometer (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "downward_near_ir_radiation" REAL /* Downward looking near-IR radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision spectral pyranometer with IR filter (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "downward_red_solar_radiation" REAL /* Downward looking red solar radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision spectral pyranometer with IR filter (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "upward_longwave_radiation" REAL /* Upward looking longwave radiation measured by the Eppley Lab precision infrared long wave radiometer (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "upward_longwave_voltage" REAL /* Upward looking longwave voltage measured by the Eppley Lab precision infrared long wave radiometer (millivolts) */,
  "pir_case_temp" REAL /* Case temperature of the PIR sensor (Kelvin) */,
  "upward_solar_radiation_sun" REAL /* Upward looking solar radiation measured by the Sunshine pyranometer (direct and diffuse) (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "upward_diffuse_radiation" REAL /* Upward looking diffuse radiation measured by the Sunshine pyranometer (direct and diffuse) (Watts/meter^2) */,
  "sun_flag" TEXT /* Sun flag indicating the presence of direct sunlight (bit) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Data quality flag to indicate potential issues with the measurement */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., pyranometer, radiometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between calibrations in months */,
  "calibration_history" TEXT /* History of calibration events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "calibration_procedure" TEXT /* Procedure for calibrating the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between measurements in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration event */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation event */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation process (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., instrument_settings, environmental_conditions) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
